name: Oligo Security
description: Oligo Security — Runtime application security platform detecting active exploitation of vulnerable open-source dependencies.

seo.title: Oligo Security — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Oligo Security: Oligo Security — Runtime application security platform detecting active exploitation of vulnerable open-source dependencies.

when_to_use: Runtime detection of actively exploited open-source CVEs
Reachability analysis to prioritize exploitable vulnerabilities
Zero-day CVE response signal for OSS dependency monitoring
Application security posture monitoring without agent overhead
SCA integration with runtime exploitability confirmation

pros: Runtime detection filters noise from SCA vulnerability lists
eBPF agent gives deep context without code changes
Focuses alerts on actually exploited libraries
Works across containers, VMs, and Kubernetes
cons: eBPF requires modern Linux kernels, limiting coverage
Young product, smaller community than incumbents
Overlaps with broader CNAPP platforms you may already run
review.verdict: Smart runtime-first approach to OSS risk cuts alert fatigue, though still proving itself vs CNAPP suites.
review.best_for: AppSec teams drowning in SCA findings who want runtime-prioritized exploitation signals.
review.not_for: Shops on legacy kernels or those already covered by a CNAPP with runtime modules.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
